case_title: DONOHOE ADVISORY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. BRILLIANT TECHNOLOGIES CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BRILLIANT TECHNOLOGIES CORPORATION

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF DONOHOE ADVISORY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BRILLIANT TECHNOLOGIES CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DONOHOE ADVISORY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRILLIANT TECHNOLOGIES CORPORATION $13,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $278.00 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,778.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BRILLIANT TECHNOLOGIES CORPORATION
